'''Chellemi Chuovvick''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Chellemi Chuovvick, as a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], was trained at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. She eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]] from the [[Jedi academy|academy]] and was selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] to train as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. After completing her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Jedi Trials]], Chuovvick was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|raised]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

During her time as a Knight, Chuovvick was partnered with fellow Jedi [[Empatojayos Brand]] and [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]] and [[Third mission to the Sepan sector|dispatched]] to the war-torn [[Sepan system/Legends|Sepan system]] as part of the third Jedi team sent to negotiate peace in the [[Sepan Civil War|endless civil war]]. Negotiations dragged on for a [[Galactic Standard Calendar|month]], bringing about a short-lived peace. Following the Jedi's departure however, the world erupted back into violence as debate raged on whether to [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|secede]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and join the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. A fourth team was expected to replace Chuovvick and the other Jedi in order to end the fighting permanently.<ref name="TCSWE" />
